name: Lamb Marinade and Barbecue
recipeIngredient: 8 lb Lamb leg; boned and butterflied
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl.
2. Place the butterflied lamb in a shallow dish and pour the marinade over it, turning to coat evenly.
3. Cover and refrigerate overnight, or for at least 4 hours.
4. Preheat your grill to high heat.
5. Remove the lamb from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
6. Place the lamb on the hot part of the grill and cook until a nice crust forms, about 10-15 minutes per side for medium-rare.
7. Baste the lamb with additional marinade as needed during cooking.
8. Best served medium to rare.
This recipe makes enough marinade for approximately 6-8 pounds of lamb. It is traditionally used for our annual July 4th BBQ celebration, which continues to be held under a tent following the Clyde Beatty Circus performance.
